body_txt: One of the best ways to show that a character has crossed the Despair Event Horizon is to give them the occasion to perform a Despair Speech to show that their hopes are lost and that there's nothing else left to do. Expect Creepy Monotone if the character is portrayed as scary. Manly Tears are occasionally involved. The character is winding up their own lack of chances, desperation, and, sometimes, remorse for something they could have done or said before. If said character is a criminal, their confession can become a Despair Speech. Authors ought to be careful when using this: if it's done too much or badly, it becomes Wangst . Contrast Badass Boast .
